metadata.notes: Public-source research through April 2026 using the uploaded existing_data plus current official sources. Existing entities are included only where material corrections or updates were found. Corrected relationship rows are included where public sources clearly support them; stale or unsupported prior rows that could not be safely re-stated were omitted.

companies.notes: AWS is now a major nuclear offtaker. Amazon announced advanced nuclear agreements in October 2024 involving X-energy and Energy Northwest, and Talen and Amazon expanded their Susquehanna arrangement into a long-term PPA in June 2025.
Bechtel is TerraPower's EPC partner on Natrium and is supporting TVA's Clinch River BWRX-300 programme as part of the project-delivery team.

Constellation is advancing the restart of Three Mile Island Unit 1 as the Crane Clean Energy Center under a 20-year Microsoft PPA, and signed a separate 20-year PPA with Meta in 2025 for the output of the Clinton Clean Energy Center starting in 2027.
Dow's wholly owned subsidiary Long Mott Energy LLC is developing the Seadrift Xe-100 project with X-energy to replace end-of-life power and steam assets at Dow's UCC Seadrift Operations site.
Fermi America is developing a private power and data campus in the Texas Panhandle and, with Westinghouse, is pursuing licensing support for four AP1000 units for the Amarillo campus.
GE Hitachi is advancing near-term BWRX-300 deployment in North America, including Darlington and TVA's Clinch River project.

Google signed a Master Plant Development Agreement with Kairos Power in October 2024 covering a U.S. advanced reactor fleet totaling 500 MW by 2035. In August 2025 Google, Kairos and TVA announced that Hermes 2 output will be sold into the TVA grid to support Google data centers in Tennessee and Alabama.

Holtec is advancing the Palisades restart and the co-located SMR-300 project. NRC received the first part of the Palisades SMR construction permit package in January 2026, while Holtec continues to target first SMR operation around 2030 under Mission 2030.
Kairos broke ground on the Hermes 2 Demonstration Plant in April 2026. The company is the owner and operator of the Hermes demonstration series and is Google's advanced reactor development partner.

Meta's nuclear procurement expanded materially in 2025-2026. It signed a 20-year PPA for Clinton with Constellation in June 2025 and in January 2026 announced additional nuclear agreements with Vistra, TerraPower and Oklo.

Microsoft's September 2024 deal with Constellation supports the restart of Three Mile Island Unit 1 as the Crane Clean Energy Center. Microsoft later described it as its first large-scale nuclear energy PPA.
OPG received a CNSC licence to construct the first Darlington BWRX-300 in April 2025 and is executing Unit 1 with the site planned for up to four SMRs.

Santee Cooper launched an RFP in January 2025 for the unfinished V.C. Summer units and by late 2025 had moved into exclusive negotiations on a potential acquisition and completion path with Brookfield Asset Management.

Talen owns and operates the Susquehanna nuclear facility and expanded its Amazon relationship in June 2025 into a long-term PPA for up to 1,920 MW through 2042. Existing database records that attribute Susquehanna operations to Constellation are inconsistent with current public disclosures.
TVA's Clinch River BWRX-300 construction permit application is under NRC review. TVA also announced an August 2025 collaboration with Google and Kairos for Hermes 2 power sales into the TVA grid.

Construction execution at Natrium Kemmerer Unit 1 began in April 2026. TerraPower also announced a January 2026 agreement with Meta covering early development for two new Natrium units plus rights for up to six additional units.
Westinghouse is supporting prospective AP1000 fleet deployment in the U.S., including licensing work with Fermi America and continued U.S. interest in AP1000 restart and new-build opportunities.

X-energy submitted the Long Mott construction permit application with Dow in March 2025 and continues to advance the Energy Northwest project. Amazon also announced a major financing commitment tied to X-energy's commercialization.
Candu Energy, an AtkinsRéalis company, holds the Unit 1 execution contract for Darlington's first BWRX-300 and remains a key delivery partner on the project.
Sizewell C Limited reached final investment decision in July 2025 and is the UK company responsible for developing, constructing, owning, operating and decommissioning the Sizewell C project.
Vistra announced January 2026 PPAs with Meta covering more than 2,600 MW from the Perry, Davis-Besse and Beaver Valley nuclear plants, including support for output increases at those stations.

projects.configuration: 1x Natrium sodium fast reactor with integrated molten salt energy storage
projects.project_schedule: Major site and enabling works began in 2024; Bechtel and TerraPower announced transition into field execution at Kemmerer Unit 1 on April 23, 2026.
projects.notes: DOE ARDP demonstration in partnership with TerraPower and Bechtel.

projects.project_name: Long Mott Generating Station Xe-100 Demonstration
projects.project_schedule: Dow and X-energy submitted a construction permit application to the NRC on March 31, 2025 for Dow's Seadrift site.
projects.notes: Project is being developed by Dow subsidiary Long Mott Energy LLC to replace existing power and steam assets at Seadrift.

projects.configuration: 4x Xe-100 initial phase; site potential for up to 12 units
projects.project_schedule: Joint development remains active; Amazon announced support for the initial four-unit phase in October 2024.
projects.notes: Project remains in development near Columbia Generating Station with an initial phase of four Xe-100 units and the potential to expand further.

projects.configuration: 2x KP-FHR units for up to 50 MW to the TVA grid
projects.project_schedule: NRC issued the construction permit in 2024 and Kairos broke ground on Hermes 2 on April 17, 2026.
projects.notes: First commercial-scale Kairos project and first power-producing Gen IV reactor to receive an NRC construction permit.

projects.project_name: Susquehanna Nuclear PPA Data Center Campus
projects.configuration: Co-located data center campus and phased PPA backed by the operating Susquehanna nuclear station
projects.project_schedule: Talen and Amazon expanded the original data center arrangement into a long-term PPA in June 2025, ramping to 1,920 MW by 2032.
projects.notes: Current public record supports Talen, not Constellation, as the plant owner/operator.

projects.project_schedule: Holtec launched Mission 2030 in February 2025; NRC received the first part of the Palisades SMR construction permit package in January 2026 and the Pioneer 1 and 2 limited work authorization application is under review.
projects.notes: Project is co-located with the Palisades restart programme.

projects.project_schedule: Santee Cooper launched an RFP in January 2025 and selected Brookfield Asset Management for exclusive negotiations in October 2025, with feasibility work continuing into 2026.
projects.notes: The project is no longer credibly described as a The Nuclear Company development in current public materials.

projects.project_schedule: Fermi America and Westinghouse announced in August 2025 that they are collaborating to finalize a COLA for four AP1000 units at the Amarillo hyperscale campus.
projects.notes: Project sits within Fermi America's broader HyperGrid campus strategy.

projects.configuration: 1x BWRX-300 in execution for Unit 1; site planned for up to 4 units total
projects.project_schedule: CNSC issued the licence to construct on April 4, 2025; OPG's later programme schedule set a high-confidence in-service date in October 2030.
projects.notes: First Darlington SMR unit is now in execution with contracts awarded to key delivery partners.

projects.project_schedule: TVA's construction permit application was docketed in April 2025 and remained under NRC review in 2026; validation and project-planning work with GE Hitachi, Bechtel and Sargent & Lundy is ongoing.
projects.notes: Leading U.S. utility-led commercial SMR licensing project.

projects.project_schedule: Constellation announced the restart plan in September 2024 and continued to report progress in 2026; the target return to service remains 2028, subject to regulatory approvals.
projects.notes: Restart of former Three Mile Island Unit 1 supported by a 20-year Microsoft PPA.

projects.project_schedule: The UK government signed final investment decision in July 2025 and Sizewell C Limited moved into fully funded project execution. Government business-case materials describe first generation in the mid-to-late 2030s.
projects.notes: Major UK new-build project with the UK government as largest shareholder.

project_company.notes: Project is being developed by Dow subsidiary Long Mott Energy LLC.
Project is intended to supply Dow's Seadrift manufacturing site with power and steam.
Joint development lead at the Washington site.
Kairos is the owner and developer of Hermes 2.
Hermes 2 output is being structured to support Google data centers through the TVA grid.
Talen is the owner behind the nuclear-backed power arrangement.
Talen public disclosures state that it owns and operates Susquehanna.
Long-term PPA expands to 1,920 MW at full quantity.
Asset owner running the restart/repurposing process.
Westinghouse is supporting licensing for four AP1000 units.
OPG will own and operate the Darlington SMR fleet.
Unit 1 execution contract awarded in May 2025.
TVA is the applicant and project sponsor.
Restart sponsor and future plant operator.

company_company.notes: Amazon announced a major financing commitment tied to X-energy's commercialization programme.
June 2025 long-term PPA for Susquehanna-backed power deliveries that ramp to 1,920 MW.
Master Plant Development Agreement covering a planned 500 MW advanced nuclear fleet by 2035.
20-year PPA supporting restart of the Crane Clean Energy Center.
20-year PPA for the output of the Clinton Clean Energy Center starting in 2027.
January 2026 PPAs covering Perry, Davis-Besse and Beaver Valley and associated output increases.
January 2026 agreement supporting early development of two new Natrium units with rights for up to six additional units.
Joint development of the Long Mott Xe-100 project at Dow's Seadrift site.
BWRX-300 technology and delivery relationship for the Darlington New Nuclear Project.
Unit 1 execution contract awarded to Candu Energy, an AtkinsRéalis company, in May 2025.
Westinghouse is supporting licensing for four AP1000 units at Fermi America's Amarillo campus.
